rule.desc: Prefer test slices (`@WebMvcTest`, `@DataJpaTest`) over full context tests.
Use `@SpringBootTest` only for true integration tests.
rule.rationale: Full context startup is slow and hides unit boundaries.

rule.desc: Use `@MockBean` for external collaborators, not for simple value objects.
Use `@TestConfiguration` or `@Import` to provide test-only beans.
rule.rationale: Avoids production code changes for tests.

rule.desc: Avoid dynamic properties that bust Spring context caching.
rule.rationale: Prevents unnecessary reboots of the app context.
